Greed is especially a keen motivator ifthe PCs offer to reward the clansmen with high-tech weapons, and toys, 
Piety has been inthe past a virtue of dubious practicality. Each war band has a priest who is not expected to fight, and who is not strict- ly under the authority of the band leader or chie's son, These priests traditionally are sup- posed to advise the band leaders and chiel’s son about the will of the gods — if anyone ex- presses an interest However, since the arrival of real gods that threaten to squash sinners and unbelievers, piety has gained a new currency. If you like, ‘ane or two of the war band leaders may be exceptionally pious, and exceptionally suscep: tible to the God Gambit, Once on a roll with this theme, these leaders and priests raise @ big ruckus, and the chiel’s son, a sensible and ambitious fellow, will risk his father’s wrath to avoid offending the MTV god.
